summary: Complete testing of Precision Craft design system applied to city pages (isCity=true). Verified all 14 sections + floating button on /daly-city-appliance-repair and /san-bruno-appliance-repair. San Francisco standalone page (/san-francisco-appliance-repair) confirmed working independently. All design requirements met: colors (navy #0D1B2A, mid-navy #1A2F45, accent #FF5722, cream #F8F5F0), Montserrat font, eyebrow letterSpacing 0.22em, no Wrench icon in Section 2 eyebrow, no HelpCircle icon in Section 11 FAQ eyebrow, Section 12 shows ALL service cities as pills (excluding current city), floating button uses 📅 emoji, MOST ASKED badge on $60 card.
critical_code_review_comments: All 14 city sections render correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Section 1 HERO: Background image with gradient overlay, eyebrow letterSpacing 0.22em verified, H1, trust badges, CTA buttons, stats row all present
Section 2 APPLIANCES: 3-column grid with 8 service cards, VIEW SERVICE buttons, NO Wrench icon in eyebrow as specified
Section 3 PROBLEMS: 2-column cards with orange left border #FF5722
Section 4 PROCESS: 4-step horizontal layout with ghost numbers 01-04
Section 5 PRICING: 3 cards on #1A2F45 background, MOST ASKED badge on $60 diagnostic card
Section 6 CTA BANNER: Centered layout with BOOK and CALL buttons on dark background with orange borders
Section 7 BRANDS: 18 brand logos in grid on cream background
Section 8 HOUSING: 2x2 grid on dark #0D1B2A background with city-specific housing types
Section 9 CASE STUDIES: 3-column cards with service tags
Section 10 REVIEWS: 2-column grid on dark background with star ratings
Section 11 FAQ: Accordion with + / × toggle in #FF5722, NO HelpCircle icon in eyebrow as specified
Section 12 NEARBY: ALL service cities shown as pills (20 cities displayed, current city excluded), not just nearby ones
Section 13 FINAL CTA: Centered with buttons on dark background
Section 14 FOOTER: Single row with logo, phone (760) 543-5733, copyright 2026
Floating BOOK REPAIR button appears after scrolling 300px, uses 📅 emoji
Mobile responsive: All 14 sections visible and properly stacked on 390x844 viewport

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only test - static site with no backend)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified Precision Craft design system on city pages using ApplianceRepairPageNew.js template with isCity=true. Key data-testid attributes for city sections: city-hero, city-hero-h1, city-trust-badges, city-hero-book, city-hero-call, city-services, city-svc-*, city-problems, city-process, city-step-01/02/03/04, city-pricing, city-cta-banner, city-cta-book, city-cta-call, city-brands, city-housing, city-case-studies, city-testimonials, city-faq, city-faq-q-*, city-nearby, city-final-cta, city-final-book, city-final-call, city-footer, city-sticky-book. San Francisco page uses separate SanFrancisco.js component with sf-* prefixed test ids. Design colors verified: navy #0D1B2A (rgb(13,27,42)), mid-navy #1A2F45 (rgb(26,47,69)), accent #FF5722 (rgb(255,87,34)), cream #F8F5F0 (rgb(248,245,240)).
